wine_experiences.name: Helicopter Tour of the Medoc First Growths
wine_experiences.address: Aeroport de Bordeaux Merignac, 33700 Merignac, France
wine_experiences.description: Aerial helicopter tour departing Bordeaux Merignac airport, overflying the Medoc five-commune appellation at low altitude with a commentary on the first-growth estates, gravel ridges, and Gironde estuary. Landing at a Pauillac chateau for cellar visit and tasting.
wine_experiences.duration: 3 hours including flight, chateau visit and tasting

verified.address_quoted: Aeroport de Bordeaux Merignac, 33700 Merignac, France

wine_experiences.name: Blending Workshop at Chateau Pontet-Canet
wine_experiences.description: Hands-on blending workshop at Bordeaux's leading biodynamic Pauillac estate. Participants blend Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Cabernet Franc and Petit Verdot from separate vat samples under winemaking team guidance; bottle labelled on-site to take home.

wine_experiences.name: Harvest Participation Experience - Saint-Emilion
wine_experiences.address: Le Doyenne, Place des Creneaux, 33330 Saint-Emilion, France
wine_experiences.description: Multi-day harvest participation programme run through the Saint-Emilion tourist office matching visitors with Grand Cru estates for 2-5 day vendange participation. Includes manual sorting, fermentation cellar access, and daily cellar-team lunch with wine.
wine_experiences.price_range: EUR 180 per person per day, including accommodation at partner estates

verified.address_quoted: Le Doyenne - Place des Creneaux 33330 Saint-Emilion

wine_experiences.name: Caudalie Vinotherapie Spa Treatments
wine_experiences.address: Les Sources de Caudalie, Chemin de Smith Haut-Lafitte, 33650 Martillac, France
wine_experiences.description: The world's original Vinotherapie spa, created in 1999 at Chateau Smith Haut Lafitte, uses grape-based treatments: the Barrel Bath (warm Merlot extract immersion), polyphenol wraps, and grape-seed body scrubs. Bookable as standalone day-spa visit or combined with hotel stay.
wine_experiences.price_range: EUR 90 Barrel Bath; EUR 280 full Vinotherapie half-day package

verified.address_quoted: Chemin de Smith Haut-Lafitte, 33650 Martillac, France

wine_experiences.name: Candlelit Cellar Dinner at Chateau Lynch-Bages
wine_experiences.description: Private dinner in the underground barrel cellar of Lynch-Bages, available to guests of Chateau Cordeillan-Bages hotel and exclusive groups. Five-course Landaise menu paired with Lynch-Bages grand vin across three vintages; Cazes family team hosts.
wine_experiences.price_range: EUR 250 per person minimum; private group booking

wine_experiences.name: First Growth Vertical Tasting (UGCB)
wine_experiences.address: Union des Grands Crus de Bordeaux, 1 cours du 30 Juillet, 33000 Bordeaux, France
wine_experiences.description: The Union des Grands Crus de Bordeaux organises annual vertical tastings open to collectors and serious enthusiasts, featuring back vintages of the five first growths across 10-15 years of production. Trade-and-collector events distinct from the primeur week.
wine_experiences.price_range: EUR 350-800 per person depending on format

wine_experiences.name: Sauternes Botrytis Harvest Walk
wine_experiences.description: Guided seasonal walk through the d'Yquem botrytised vines during the October harvest, with the estate agronomist explaining noble rot progression, selective hand-picking (tries), and the climatic conditions that make Sauternes unique. Concludes with a barrel-tasting from the new vintage.
wine_experiences.price_range: EUR 120 per person; seasonal October only
